channel.title: Test on Garys World
channel.description: Recent content in Test on Garys World

item.title: Test
item.description:
this is a test of putting some text into the page.

backend:
  name: git-gateway
  branch: main # Branch to update (optional; defaults to master)
  squash_merges: true
  commit_messages:
    create: "Create {{collection}} “{{slug}}”"
    update: "Update {{collection}} “{{slug}}”"
    delete: "Delete {{collection}} “{{slug}}”"
    uploadMedia: "[skip ci] Upload “{{path}}”"
    deleteMedia: "[skip ci] Delete “{{path}}”"

heading

strikethrough

another picture
